# Sponsors (AUTO GENERATED)

Support wwebjs development and help us maintain and improve the project!

## Why Sponsor?

Your sponsorship helps us:

- Maintain and improve the codebase
- Provide community support
- Create documentation and guides
- Host infrastructure
- Organize community events

## Sponsorship Tiers

### 🥉 Bronze Sponsor - $10/month

- Your name in our README
- Sponsor badge on GitHub
- Access to sponsors-only Discord channel

### 🥈 Silver Sponsor - $50/month

All Bronze benefits, plus:

- Logo on our website
- Priority issue responses
- Monthly sponsor newsletter

### 🥇 Gold Sponsor - $100/month

All Silver benefits, plus:

- Featured placement on website
- Direct communication channel
- Influence on roadmap
- Early access to features

### 💎 Platinum Sponsor - $500/month

All Gold benefits, plus:

- Custom integration support
- Dedicated support channel
- Co-marketing opportunities
- Custom feature requests

## How to Sponsor

### GitHub Sponsors

The easiest way to sponsor wwebjs:

[Sponsor on GitHub →](https://github.com/sponsors/wwebjs)

### Open Collective

Support through Open Collective for transparent funding:

[Donate on Open Collective →](https://opencollective.com/wwebjs)

### Corporate Sponsorship

For corporate sponsorship opportunities, contact us at:
[sponsors@wwebjs.dev](mailto:sponsors@wwebjs.dev)
